clinical_history: This 10-second rhythm shows at least three, and probably four, different rhythms!  Can you find them?
diagnosis: 1)  Paroxysmal atrial flutter with variable block (beginning and end).   2)  Sinus rhythm (one beat after the initial spontaneous conversion of atrial flutter).    3)  Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation (between third and fourth beats after V1-V3 lead change marker).     4)  Probably one or two premature atrial complexes -- between events 2) and 3).
